[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 100111100 5
2 010111100 5
3 001001000 2
4 010100110 4
5 100000100 2
6 110100110 5
7 111011000 5

01 10 000111100 4
12 21 000001000 1
23 32 000000000 a match 0
34 43 000000100 1
45 54 100000100 2 match 5
56 65 110000000 2
67 76 010010000 2
70 07 000010100 2

13 31 010100100 3
24 42 000000000 a match 0

46 64 100000000 1
57 75 010000100 2

71 17 010010100 3

25 52 000000000 a match 0

47 74 000000100 1
50 05 100100100 3

72 27 000000000 a match 0
